language.title: Language
language.hint: Changes take effect immediately. RTL languages are fully supported.
language.openFolderHint: Drop a new xx.json file into the locales folder to add a custom language.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Click a binding to record a new shortcut. Press Escape to cancel.

hints.saveReplay: Saves the current replay buffer as a new clip file
hints.toggleRecording: Starts or stops a manual full-length recording session
hints.screenshot: Captures a screenshot of the active screen to your Pictures folder
hints.splitClip: Splits the clip at the current playhead position in the editor
hints.exportClip: Opens the export dialog to save the trimmed clip as a video file
hints.toggleMic: Mutes or unmutes your microphone across all recording tracks
hints.undo: Undo the last trim change in the editor
hints.redo: Redo the last undone trim change

mixerRouting.title: Mixer Routing
mixerRouting.hint: Configure how audio streams are routed through virtual PipeWire sinks.

eqAutoFlatten.title: EQ Auto-Flatten
eqAutoFlatten.hint: Automatically flatten EQ curves when switching audio profiles.

captureSound.title: Capture & Sound
captureSound.captureHint: Assign PipeWire virtual sinks to each recording track (OBS-style).

clipSettings.title: Clip Settings
clipSettings.trackColorsHint: Colors are applied as CSS variables to the timeline editor.
clipSettings.cleared: Cleared {count} thumbnails. Reload clips to regenerate.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.hint: Toggle optional editor features. Disabled extensions are hidden everywhere — keeping the interface clean for what you actually use.
extensions.overlaysDesc: Burn text, images, and GIFs into your clips at export time.
extensions.tiktokExportDesc: Crop and export clips in 9:16 portrait mode for TikTok / Reels.
extensions.restartHint: Changes apply immediately — no restart required.
